title: Add action item from AI notetaker to an existing item

posts.author: NielsLA (Niels)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We would like to add the action item from AI notetaker to a specific item. So after a video conference, we can add all items as subitems to the lead/item. Now, it is always generating a new item.

What are you trying to achieve

We can add all action items as subitems from the AI notetaker from our teams meeting. Would be great!
